B40_INTERNAL_DECISIONS.name: INTERNAL_DECISIONS
B40_INTERNAL_DECISIONS.purpose: Canonical location for ALL strategic and tactical decisions with interrelationships
B40_INTERNAL_DECISIONS.scope: Strategic direction, tactical execution, decision rationale, interrelationships
B40_INTERNAL_DECISIONS.misi_role: PRIMARY - All decision information lives here, referenced by other blocks

sections.name: Strategic Decisions
sections.format: Decision ID (D#) | Decision | Type | Rationale | Related Tactical Decisions

sections.name: Tactical Decisions
sections.format: Decision ID (T#) | Decision | Type | Rationale | Supports Strategic Decision(s)
sections.note: Links to strategic objectives via cross-reference

sections.name: Holistic Pushes
sections.format: Initiative name | Strategic rationale | Tactical blocks | Dependencies | Success criteria
sections.purpose: Capture complete strategic initiatives with execution path

sections.name: Resolved Tactical Debates
sections.note: Only if debate occurred during meeting

cross_references.format: Use B40.D# for strategic, B40.T# for tactical

extract_from_transcript: Any decision language: 'we decided', 'let's go with', 'the plan is'
Strategic shifts: 'we should pivot', 'our focus needs to be'
Tactical approaches: 'we'll do this by', 'the implementation is'

two_axis_framework.axis_2: Decision Type - Product | GTM | Ops | Hiring | Investment | Partnerships
two_axis_framework.interrelationships: Always link tactical to strategic, strategic to tactical execution

B41_TEAM_COORDINATION.name: TEAM_COORDINATION
B41_TEAM_COORDINATION.purpose: Action items with owners, deadlines, and decision context via references
B41_TEAM_COORDINATION.scope: Who does what by when, dependencies, blockers
B41_TEAM_COORDINATION.misi_role: DERIVATIVE - Action items reference B40 for strategic context

structure.format: Table with columns: Owner | Action | Context [B40 ref] | Due Date | Dependencies | Status
structure.note: Use cross-references to B40 for WHY, this block captures WHO/WHAT/WHEN

extract_from_transcript: Deadlines: 'by end of week', 'before next meeting', specific dates
Dependencies: 'once X is done', 'needs Y first', 'blocks Z'
Blockers: 'waiting on', 'need access to', 'can't proceed until'
rules: Every action MUST have an owner
Link to B40 decision when action implements a strategic/tactical decision

B42_MARKET_COMPETITIVE_INTEL.name: MARKET_COMPETITIVE_INTEL
B42_MARKET_COMPETITIVE_INTEL.purpose: Market trends, competitive landscape, customer insights from internal discussion
B42_MARKET_COMPETITIVE_INTEL.scope: External market intelligence extracted from internal strategic conversations
B42_MARKET_COMPETITIVE_INTEL.misi_role: PRIMARY - Canonical location for market intelligence from internal meetings
generation_conditions: Discussion includes market trends or competitive analysis
Customer feedback or ICP insights discussed

sections: Market Trends: What's changing in the market
Competitive Intelligence: What competitors are doing
Customer Insights: What we're learning about ICP/customers
Positioning Implications: How this affects our positioning

cross_references.note: Links to strategic decisions that were influenced by this intelligence

B43_PRODUCT_INTELLIGENCE.name: PRODUCT_INTELLIGENCE
B43_PRODUCT_INTELLIGENCE.purpose: Product strategy, roadmap, architecture, and technical decisions
B43_PRODUCT_INTELLIGENCE.misi_role: PRIMARY - Product intelligence separate from GTM
generation_conditions: Technical approach or engineering strategy covered
Product-market fit or user experience topics

sections: Product Strategy: High-level product direction
Roadmap Updates: Timeline and priorities
Feature Decisions: What we're building and why [links to B40]
Technical Approach: Architecture or implementation decisions
User Experience: UX insights or design decisions

B44_GTM_SALES_INTEL.name: GTM_SALES_INTEL
B44_GTM_SALES_INTEL.purpose: Go-to-market strategy, sales process, pricing, distribution
B44_GTM_SALES_INTEL.misi_role: PRIMARY - GTM intelligence separate from product
generation_conditions: GTM strategy or sales process discussed

sections: GTM Strategy: High-level go-to-market approach
Sales Process: Pipeline, process changes, conversion insights
Pricing & Packaging: Pricing decisions or packaging changes [links to B40]
Distribution: Channels, partnerships, platform strategy
Messaging & Positioning: How we talk about the product

B45_OPERATIONS_PROCESS.name: OPERATIONS_PROCESS
B45_OPERATIONS_PROCESS.purpose: Operational processes, tools, workflows, and organizational decisions
B45_OPERATIONS_PROCESS.scope: How we work, what tools we use, process improvements

sections: Process Changes: New or modified workflows [links to B40]
Tool Decisions: Tools adopted, deprecated, or evaluated
Team Structure: Organizational changes or coordination approaches
Efficiency Improvements: Operational optimizations

B46_HIRING_TEAM.name: HIRING_TEAM
B46_HIRING_TEAM.purpose: Hiring decisions, role definitions, team expansion
generation_conditions: Hiring needs or role definitions discussed

sections: Hiring Decisions: Roles to hire, rationale [links to B40]
Role Definitions: Responsibilities and requirements
Compensation Strategy: Salary, equity, or benefits decisions
Pipeline Status: Current candidates or recruiting progress

B47_OPEN_DEBATES.name: OPEN_DEBATES
B47_OPEN_DEBATES.purpose: Unresolved strategic questions and debates that require future resolution
B47_OPEN_DEBATES.scope: Strategic uncertainty, open questions, debates not yet settled
B47_OPEN_DEBATES.misi_role: PRIMARY - Canonical location for unresolved strategic items

structure.format: Question ID (Q#) | Question | Type (Strategic/Tactical) | Context | Perspectives | Next Steps
sections: Strategic Open Questions: High-level strategic uncertainty
Tactical Open Questions: Unresolved tactical approaches (only if blocking)
Trade-offs Under Consideration: Explicit trade-offs being debated

rules: Tactical disagreements that were RESOLVED go to B40, not here
Only capture unresolved items that need future discussion
Focus on strategic uncertainty, not minor tactical details
Link to B40 if related to existing decisions

B48_STRATEGIC_MEMO.name: STRATEGIC_MEMO
B48_STRATEGIC_MEMO.purpose: Executive synthesis of major internal meetings, synthesizing across all blocks
B48_STRATEGIC_MEMO.scope: High-level strategic summary with key decisions, initiatives, and open questions
B48_STRATEGIC_MEMO.misi_role: SYNTHESIS - Pulls from all other blocks to create coherent narrative
generation_conditions: Major strategic decisions made (B40 has significant strategic decisions)
Multiple domains covered (product + GTM + ops, etc.)

sections: Executive Summary: 2-3 sentence overview
Key Strategic Decisions: Summarize from B40 with references
Major Initiatives: Holistic pushes from B40 with tactical execution path
Intelligence Highlights: Key insights from B42-B46
Open Strategic Questions: From B47
Next Steps: Critical actions from B41
Strategic Implications: What this means for the company

cross_references.note: This is the ONLY block that synthesizes across blocks; it's an exception to MISI for readability

generation_guidance.audience: Future V reading this 3 months later needs full context
